title: Foxglove Excelsior Mixed Seeds Grow Your Own Multicoloured Flowers
description: Product Description Foxglove Excelsior Mixed A stunning cottage garden plant producing tall striking blooms in a wonderful mix of colours. Ideal for cut flowers. Hardy Perennial. Indoor Planting Sprinkle seeds onto the surface of the soil in trays of moist compost and press down, be areful not to over-water. Store under glass. Growing on When the seedlings are strong enough to handle they can be transplanted into bigger pots or trays. Do not overcrowd the plants and keep in a warm, light position. Once all chance of frost has passed the plants can be transplanted direct into your desired location. Harden off first. Outdoor Planting Sow seeds 0.5cm deep in flowering location, thin to above spacings. Flowers following spring. Sow Indoors Jan - May Sow Outdoors April - June Spacing 12”/ 30cm Flowering Height 50-60”/ 115-138cm Flowers June Onwards Average seed content 2745 Seeds
